title: Villagers Catch
description: A server-side Fabric mod for capturing and transporting Villagers and Zombies, plus a real-time Iron Farm monitoring system.
body:
VillagersCatch is a server-side utility mod built with Polymer, fully compatible with vanilla clients. It provides powerful tools for managing villagers and optimizing iron farms.

   🎣 Entity Capture System

   Capture and transport entities with specialized nets:

     - Villager Net - Catch and release villagers while preserving all their data (profession, trades, experience)
     - Zombie Net - Capture zombies for curing stations or transportation
     - Each net holds up to 64 entities with full NBT data preservation
     - Visual feedback with enchantment glint when nets contain entities

   ⚙️ Iron Farm Monitor

   A comprehensive real-time monitoring system for iron golem farms:

     - Automatic golem spawn detection - Only counts villager-spawned golems (ignores player-built)
     - Live statistics via action bar display
     - Farm structure analysis - Checks villager beds, jobs, sleep status, and spawn readiness
     - Performance metrics - Spawn rate, average intervals, and hourly projections
     - Supports both Gossip and Panic spawn mechanics

   🔧 Commands

     - /ironmonitor start [radius] - Begin monitoring at your position
     - /ironmonitor follow [radius] - Monitor while moving
     - /ironmonitor stats - View detailed statistics
     - /ironmonitor analyze - Re-scan farm structure
     - /ironmonitor stop - End session with summary report

   ✨ Features

     - 100% Server-side - No client mod required
     - Vanilla compatible - Works with unmodded clients via Polymer
     - Items appear as vanilla fishing rods and glowstone dust to vanilla players
